justification: Both outputs are very close across all dimensions — accurate skills, well-calibrated counts, no project type taxonomy applied (neutral score for both), and strong concrete metrics preserved. The tiebreaker goes to B for two reasons: (1) B preserves the original resume bullets more faithfully without paraphrasing that risks distortion (e.g., A introduces 'production multi-channel B2B AI agent infrastructure' and 'configuration integrity' language not in the source), and (2) B correctly uses the website-matching GitHub handle 'suqjan' consistent with the personal site 'suqjan.com', while A fabricates 'github.com/sujan'. Truthfulness and fidelity to source text — the core stress-test criterion — favor B.
